description: Append-only provenance manifest superseding PM-003. Fixes: lti-launch.status corrected to schema-valid 'unavailable', test count synchronized to 121, dirty-path count updated to live measurement (586), drift_status set to 'assessed'. No historical data in PM-003 was overwritten.
